case_title: JUAN CARLOS MAYEN VS. BARNEY'S SAN FRANCISCO, INC.

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF MAYEN, JUAN CARLOS AS TO DEFENDANT BARNEY'S SAN FRANCISCO, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA BARNEY'S MARINA HAMBURGERS JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MAYEN, JUAN CARLOS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BARNEY'S SAN FRANCISCO, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA BARNEY'S MARINA HAMBURGERS $3,653.62 PRINCIPAL, $12.20 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,890.82, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
